title: SensemakerOutput
description: Strict JSON contract for the Sensemaker stage. The pipeline halts if confidence < 0.6, classification === 'wicked', or halt_reason is non-null.

inferred_problem.description: Concise statement of the problem to solve next. Null when halting.

problem_classification.description: well-structured: clear goal + path. ill-structured: clear goal, unclear path. wicked: contested goal, no stopping criterion.

confidence.description: How confident the Sensemaker is in its inference. < 0.6 trips the halt gate.

halt_reason.description: Specific contradiction or missing context. Non-null halts the pipeline.

evidence.description: Concrete signals supporting the classification and confidence
